    ⚠️💨# | "Trend Strength Rating"
    ⚠️🌀💨 | "Trend Strength Rating" (see above)
    ⚠️🌀 CAT. # | [same; "CAT." = Category, like hurricane]
    💬# | 10min Post Count
    🆎# | 10min Word Count
    🙂# | 10min Emoji Count

record.text: So here's the comparison, originals are at the bottom, layered on top of the Prime image... width and height proportions are off on some of the processed ones, interestingly. It is subtle, and one has to look closely, but some interesting differences, at least to this lifelong visual artist nerd.
So, they were originally illustrations by an artist (based on my research)... and originally looked better in detail than the AI processed ones. www.radiotimes.com/tv/sci-fi/jo...
